variables.name: callbackNumber
variables.description: The number the caller wants for a callback destination

variables.name: Global_Language
variables.description: System-defined variable to store the language

variables.name: Global_VoiceName
variables.description: System-defined variable to store the voice name

variables.name: Global_FeedbackSurveyOptIn
variables.description: System-defined variable that indicates if the caller opts in to complete a feedback survey

variables.name: httpDebug
variables.description: Debug for HTTP Agent Wellbeing request

variables.name: ccUserID
variables.description: Contact Center User ID (Agent ID).  Substitute your test agent ID here for Agent Wellbeing

properties.name: Basic_Menu
properties.description:
Menu for Support Queue with Callback or Dog Bark.
Added demo "AA" option for Susan in Finance...
This menu also serves as an agreement for opting in to Post Call Survey!  Would probably do that separate ITRW.
properties.connector_name:name: Cisco Cloud Text-to-Speech
properties.connector:name: Cisco Cloud Text-to-Speech
properties.connector:name:name: Cisco Cloud Text-to-Speech

promptsTts.value:
To test Callback for the Support Queue as well as opt-in for Post Call Survey, press 1.
To hear a dog bark, press 2
For Susan in Finance, press 3
promptsTts.name:
To test Callback for the Support Queue as well as opt-in for Post Call Survey, press 1.
To hear a dog bark, press 2
For Susan in Finance, press 3

promptsTts.value: Your current callback number is
promptsTts.name: Your current callback number is

promptsTts.value:
<speak>
<prosody rate="slow" pitch="-1st">
<say-as interpret-as="telephone">{{tenDigitANI}}
</say-as>
</prosody>
</speak>
promptsTts.name:
<speak>
<prosody rate="slow" pitch="-1st">
<say-as interpret-as="telephone">{{tenDigitANI}}
</say-as>
</prosody>
</speak>

promptsTts.value: If you would like us to call you back at that number, press 1.  If you would like to enter a new callback number, press 2.
promptsTts.name: If you would like us to call you back at that number, press 1.  If you would like to enter a new callback number, press 2.
